title: manulea minuscula
intro: Manulea minuscula, also known as dwarf manulea, is a small, herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal problems. Manulea minuscula is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
